title: dryopteris bullata
intro: Dryopteris bullata, also known as the leathery shield fern, is a type of fern that is native to the mountains of Europe and Asia. The plant is used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which are attributed to the presence of sesquiterpenes and flavonoids. The health benefits of Dryopteris bullata include its potential to reduce inflammation and improve respiratory conditions, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its ability to support liver and kidney function. Dryopteris bullata can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infusion, which are used to treat various health conditions.
